subject: DevOps
title: Heroku's 2022 Security Incident
description: A tiny lesson with a big payoff: Heroku's 2022 Security Incident.

hook.text: April 2022. Heroku discovered stolen OAuth tokens. They revoked all GitHub integrations.

buildup.text: Attackers accessed a Heroku database containing OAuth tokens for GitHub integrations.

discovery.text: The tokens let attackers access private repos of Heroku customers. Scope of compromise was unclear.

twist.text: Heroku's incident communication was criticized. Updates were vague and slow for weeks.

climax.text: Customers lost trust. Many migrated away. Transparent communication could have limited the damage.

punchline.text: Communicate clearly during incidents. Silence erodes trust.

quiz.question: What worsened the impact of Heroku's 2022 security incident?
options: Vague and slow communication during the incident
The attack affected all cloud providers
